message:
fix(eval): apply FILTER clause on aggregates in GROUP BY eval (#91)

eval_group_agg_join_expr ignored the FILTER clause on aggregate
function calls (SUM/COUNT/etc.), computing over all group rows instead
of only rows matching the filter predicate. SUM(amount) FILTER(WHERE
product='X') now correctly pre-filters rows before aggregation.

Also adds 5 new conformance tests (247 total): window partition+order,
multiway JOIN, NULL propagation, complex INSERT, aggregate FILTER.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
